hotel_name: Khách sạn Mimosa Phú Quốc (Mimosa Hotel Phu Quoc)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Worst staff and hotelz

reviews.title: It was fine but I would not stay there anymore
reviews.positives: The location was good.
reviews.negatives:
There was a problem with the key card — only one was given. I couldn’t charge anything in my room because when I removed the card, there was no electricity.
The room was not cleaned every day.
There was no electricity for a few hours at one point.
The staff did not speak English.

reviews.title: Couldn't sleep well  due to construction
reviews.text: The girl at the front desk lied to me there won't be any noise the next day from construction and so I booked an extra night. Big mistake, couldn't sleep properly for two night as the the noise went on every morning from 8am-11am. Absolutely disgusting!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: I liked the location because it was relatively quiet but still walkable to various cafes and restaurants. I usually inspect hotel rooms carefully for cleanliness, and this room was quite clean. The water in the shower was very hot and never ran out. Also the internet was fast and stable. The tv is a good size but, unfortunately the tv is not bluetooth compatible to connect headphones to.
reviews.negatives: The staff were nice but were not informative or took any initiative to explain anything about the hotel and what amenities and services were available. Even during check in. None of the ones I spoke with spoke any English so make sure you use a translator app. I could feel the springs in my bed a little. Also the AC worked ok, but not good enough to ever make the room feel cool enough to turn it off. And I'm sure this is probably because I was in a smaller room, but my bathroom was super tiny. You had to go in and shut the door just so you could move inside the bathroom. However the price of the room was so good that it kind of makes all of this moot.

reviews.title: Worst sanitation service.
reviews.text:
Worst hygiene, worst security, worst service  
Bed bugs, bloody mattress, windows that won't close, sewer smell

reviews.title: I would recommend others to book this hotel
reviews.positives: The staff was very helpful, the facility was very clean, and the price was reasonable.
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: Building disinfection needed.
reviews.text: The room was big and clean, which I liked. However, when I tried to take a shower, suddenly several large cockroaches appeared. It seemed like they were coming up from the bathroom drain. I sprayed a lot of insecticide and blocked them with a towel, and the next day several dead baby cockroaches showed up. It seems they had laid eggs. Regular pest control is needed.

reviews.title: The hotel exceeded our expectations
reviews.positives: Clean rooms, helpful staff, and a very peaceful atmosphere. We especially loved the scent in the corridors – refreshing and relaxing

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Spacious room, slow elevator, far away from tourist place
reviews.response: Cảm ơn anh/chị đã phản hồi đánh giá. Khách sạn ghi nhận thông tin đánh giá của anh chị và khắc phục sự cố Mong anh chị sẽ có kì nghỉ tiếp theo tại khách sạn

reviews.title: A wonderful family hotel
reviews.positives: Every corner was clean, the staff were friendly, and the location could not be better. Close to Sunset Town and the market.

reviews.title: Several things to be improved
reviews.text:
There some positives about staying in this hotel but also some negatives.

Cleanliness ok +
Room size ok
Space in lobby good
Internet wifi ok
Tv size good
Recepcionist wellcoming neutral

Now the negatives:

No chairs outside to seat , so if you like sometimes to seat outside then this hotel does not provide exterior chairs. 
That also can be a problem also if you smoke as you have no place for it. 
So if you are a smoker this may not be an hotel  option for you. 
Most of the hotels in Phu Quoc have chairs to seat outside and even tables but not this hotel.

Its a noise hotel as a family guest making loud noise will be accepted and ok for the hotel, they dont do anything about it or care.
Dont be surprised that the entrance door is closed at night and the recepcionist is sleeping.
Nobody of the staff  speaks english.
reviews.response:
Mimosa Hotel xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm sau kỳ nghỉ.

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết Quý khách hài lòng về sự sạch sẽ, không gian phòng, khu vực sảnh cũng như chất lượng wifi và TV tại khách sạn.

Bên cạnh đó, chúng tôi cũng thành thật xin lỗi vì những bất tiện mà Quý khách đã gặp phải liên quan đến không gian ngoài trời, tiếng ồn, cũng như trải nghiệm phục vụ vào ban đêm và khả năng giao tiếp của nhân viên. Đây là những góp ý rất quan trọng để chúng tôi nhìn nhận và cải thiện dịch vụ tốt hơn.

Mimosa Hotel sẽ nghiêm túc xem xét các vấn đề trên và nâng cao chất lượng phục vụ trong thời gian tới nhằm mang đến trải nghiệm thoải mái và trọn vẹn hơn cho khách hàng.
Một lần nữa, cảm ơn Quý khách đã chia sẻ và hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội được đón tiếp Quý khách tốt hơn trong tương lai.

reviews.title: Wonderful stay
reviews.positives: We stayed two nights and wish we could stay longer. The hotel’s cleanliness and attention to detail were outstanding. Perfect location for couples who enjoy exploring local culture.

reviews.title: Check out
reviews.text: Noisy renovation n unplesant service

reviews.title: We stayed here with our kids and loved it.
reviews.positives: Everything was tidy, quiet, and family-friendly. The staff helped us with directions and even lent us umbrellas when it rained.

reviews.title: Decent rooms but service was very lacking
reviews.text:
We stayed here for 6 days- Overall an okay stay however we would like to give some constructive criticism on service to help this hotel be better!
Upon arrival there was no one at reception, we waited 20 minutes and tried calling the number given but no answer so had to check ourselves in eventually. Never done this at a hotel before?
Our room was very nice, it had a comfy bed and nice shower although we had quite a lot of cold showers especially in the morning as the heat would not work, not ideal when you're paying a fair bit for the room.
Room service wasn't great, initially we weren't given a sign to put on the door so had to ask reception for one.
We booked a triple room so we were supposed to be given 3 waters however about halfway through our stay they gave us less water- we thought this was abit tight baring in mind we're paying more for a triple room and you can't drink the tap water.
We ran out of shower gel and contacted reception who said they would get us some. This never turned up and wasn't picked up by room service the next day so we asked them again-we were told there was confusion about which room we were staying in and they gave it to the wrong room. They apologised for the mistake.
We rented a motorbike during our stay which was easy and hassle free for 150k a day, would recommend doing this for getting around.

reviews.title: My partner and I loved every moment here
reviews.positives: The hotel is beautifully maintained, the room was bright and fragrant, and the staff were truly exceptional. The proximity to Hon Thom cable car made it easy to explore the island.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: We had to ask for our bed sheets to be changed as they were dirty as soon as we walked through the door. We also had remove 3-4 dead cockroaches in the room and bathroom as soon as  walked in.  Was very modern but seemed to be an issue with cockroaches entering the room each day

reviews.title: Everything exceeded expectations.
reviews.positives: The room had a beautiful view and was always spotless. Receptionists were polite and professional, and they even helped us book a dinner at a local seafood restaurant.

reviews.title: Bad hotel manager
reviews.text: The shower water pressure and volume is too tiny, they can’t do anything to solve. It is also very noisy in the morning. We rent a bike from them , but turns out the staff help us to rent outside on her own and the hotel refused to pay anything about we had an accident due to the braking problem of the bike.We were asked to pay 1.3 million dong and pay 600000 for medical service. The support from the hotel is bad, the staff is fine, just a bad owner and manger.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Muy cómodo y amplio

reviews.title: good
reviews.text: its all good just the location is 900m from the market
reviews.room_type: Standard Double Room with City View

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
10min a pied au sunset town 
La rue est calme
reviews.negatives: Deux jrs sans eaux chaude, le nettoyage des chambres ne se fait pas automatiquement, il fallait que je leur demande de nettoyer la chambre et pas changement de serviettes ni ajout du papier toilettes

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The room is clean, but lacking in small amenities (no paper towels, no internal phone, and the broken restroom had to be reported twice before someone came to fix it). The receptionist is polite, helpful, and cheerful.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: l'hotel etait tres bien situé et tres agreable juste la taille du matelas et son confort son a revoir mis a part ca le personnel a été parfait du debut a la fin malgré la barriere de la langue

reviews.title: clean hotel
reviews.text: very good, simple & clean hotel, near Sunset Town
reviews.response: Cảm ơn anh/chị đã phản hồi đánh giá. Khách sạn ghi nhận thông tin đánh giá của anh chị và khắc phục sự cố Mong anh chị sẽ có kì nghỉ tiếp theo tại khách sạn

reviews.title: Séjour génial avec un emplacement au top malgré notre aventure avec les cafards
reviews.positives:
Nous avons réservé dans un premier temps pour 1 nuit, nous avons tellement adoré que nous avons prolongé de 2 nuits (dans une autre chambre).
L’hôtel est chaleureux, propre, personnel accueillant et à l’écoute.
Emplacement idéal, calme, à proximité du Sunset Town, plage, SunWorld.
reviews.negatives:
- L’insonorisation de la porte/chambre
- Nous avons effectué une machine à laver, nous avons eu des affaires qui n’était pas à nous et notre linge a été abîmé/rétréci, je pense que le programme n’a pas été adapté (>30•)
- Lors de notre 1ère nuit tout a été fabuleux, lorsque nous avons prolongé de 2 nuits de + (changement de chambre) : la chambre était propre mais nous avons eu 1 cafard dans la chambre et 1 cafard dans la salle de bain. Le personnel nous a fourni une bonbonne pour les éradiquer + des pastilles : ça nous a un peu gâché notre séjour.

Mise à part cette histoire de cafard, l’hôtel était génial !

reviews.title: Too noisy
reviews.text: I liked the hotel itself, BUT they present themselves as an adult hotel, and during my stay (7 days) kids were running through the corridor during nighttime, also adults were making noises like at 2 or 3 am. So, of you want to have a good sleep, this place is not suitable.

reviews.title: Magnifique hôtel offrant un excellent service.
reviews.positives: L'équipe de la réception était accueillante et nous a donné de précieux conseils sur les restaurants locaux. Notre chambre sentait bon et était nettoyée quotidiennement à la perfection. Le quartier de l'hôtel était animé sans être bruyant, ce qui en faisait un lieu idéal pour les couples.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: I booked a 2-night stay in a room with a balcony here, but upon arrival, the staff assigned me to a room with only a small window. I had to go down to give feedback twice. The first time, they said they would change my room to one with a balcony tomorrow, and the second time, they said all the rooms were full, so they offered me a discount of 50k per night. The way of resolving the issue was okay, but the main problem is that for the price of 450k/night, my room had cockroaches, and during the 3 days and 2 nights I stayed, I encountered 3 of them. The third one, after my husband kicked it out of the room, lay dead in the hallway for a whole day, and when I checked out, no one had cleaned it. I feel that for that price, the cleaning should be better. I hope the hotel can improve.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Lage

reviews.title: Clean hotel but the location need to travel
reviews.text: You need to catch taxi for Kiss Bridge, cable or some famous restaurant.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Lage!
reviews.negatives: Zimmertür nicht Schalldicht!

reviews.title: Comfortable stay with helpful staff, minor drawbacks
reviews.text: The property is conveniently located in a pleasant area, with Bazaar Sunset Town and the cable car terminal just a 15–20 minute walk away. The rooms were clean and comfortable, and the staff were friendly and helpful. However, daily supplies of water, tea, and coffee were not provided proactively—I had to request them at the reception each day. While the staff always responded promptly and courteously, this is something guests should ideally be provided with daily without having to ask. Additionally, the room kept getting filled with  mosquitoes out of nowhere, I failed to figure out how, so be prepared for that.

reviews.title: Every thing NEW and staff was excellent!!!!
reviews.positives:
Every thing fine .very new hotel .staff was excellent.they try to help the best for us ….if you want to rent bike they have moterbike .

とても素晴らしいところです！落ち着きます。本当に綺麗です。
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: great place
reviews.text: staff are friendly, good location. However, there was mold in the room, one nite i stayed there.  I mentioned this to the lady at the front desk.  i wonder if they fixed it.  Not healthy to breathe mold for a night, so i wore a mask.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
이미지로도 깨끗해보였는데 오픈된지 1년뿐이 안되었다 하셨고 위치가 선셋타운 야시장이나 케이블카역 사오비치 코코넛수용소 멀지않아 너무 좋았습니다. 베스트위치.
바로앞 대장금 이라는 한국식당이 있지만 주변엔 아직 카페, 로컬식당 정도 아무것도 없지만 조용하니 좋습니다 저녁에 시간되면 심포니불꽃소리가 들리긴하지만 크게 신경쓰일정도 아니었구요
객실내부 조명도 밝아서 그점도 너무 좋았습니다.
넷플릭스, 유투브 가능. 가격대비 완전 대박입니다
불편한점 있으면 바로 체크해서 도와주셨고 저희가족은 만족했습니다
reviews.negatives: 단점이 너무 가까워서일까요? 가까운거리는 그랩잡기가 힘들었어요 숙소에서는 잘 잡히는데 돌아올때 워낙 붐비기도하고 가까운거리는 승차거부로 부킹되는데 넘 오래걸려서 숙소까지 걸어가기도하고 정차되어있는 기사님하고 직접 얘기해서 돌아오고했네요

reviews.title: The accommodation had slightly lacking surrounding infrastructure.
reviews.text: The accommodation is located in a quiet place about a 10-15 minute walk from Sunset Town. The surrounding infrastructure is a bit lacking, and when calling for Grab to go to Sunset Town, most drivers refuse. However, it is easy to use Grab to go to other places. The accommodation itself is clean and reasonably priced. The staff is very friendly.

reviews.title: Excellent and Comfortable Stay
reviews.text: Had a very pleasant stay at the hotel. The rooms were clean, comfortable, and well-maintained. The staff was courteous, helpful, and ensured a smooth experience throughout the stay. The location was convenient, and overall service quality was excellent. Would definitely recommend this hotel for a comfortable and hassle-free stay.

reviews.title: Excellent

Phòng sạch sẽ, có đầy đủ tiện nghi, yên tĩnh, thuộc Khu đô thị An Thới rất gần với thị trấn hoàng hôn, rất tiện nếu có kế hoạch du lịch gần khu An Thới. Các bạn tiếp tân cũng rất là dễ thương.
Mình đặt phòng ở booking cho phòng có ban công hướng nắng luôn là 355k. Siêu đáng tiền luôn.
Loại chuyến đi
reviews.negatives: Không có

reviews.title: 9 nights stay
reviews.text:
We really enjoyed our stay here at mimosa hotel, the location was perfect for us. Plenty of cafes close by and you are about 20-30
Minutes walk to sunset town which has plenty of bars and restaurants. The hotel was excellent, the rooms were spotless and has everything you need. The staff here were also really kind and helpful. I would definitely book here again
reviews.response:
Mimosa Hotel xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã lựa chọn lưu trú và chia sẻ những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời tại khách sạn.

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết Quý khách hài lòng về vị trí thuận tiện, phòng ốc sạch sẽ cũng như sự thân thiện và hỗ trợ từ đội ngũ nhân viên. Đây chính là động lực để chúng tôi không ngừng nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ.

Mimosa Hotel rất mong được chào đón Quý khách quay trở lại trong thời gian sắp tới để tiếp tục mang đến những trải nghiệm trọn vẹn hơn.

Trân trọng,
Mimosa Hotel

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Окна были сломаны и нормально не закрывались, утром было шумно. Не давали вторую карточку от номера, потеряли вещи которые сдавали в стирку, слив в душе не работал нормально. Не рекомендую данный отель

reviews.title: Great hotel with reasonable price
reviews.text: We have chosen Mimosa hotel and very happy with its facilities and services.

reviews.title: Мой опыт проживания был не лучшим. Хотелось побыстрее уехать, что мы и сделали.
reviews.positives: Отель в достаточно хорошем состоянии
reviews.negatives:
Уборка номеров была 2 раза 10 дней, первый день не было горячей воды, маленький напор в душе, через дорогу идут ремонты, не всегда спокойно.
По приезду не было туалетной бумаги и постоянно приходилось просить её на ресепшене.

Пустой город, рядом малолюдно. Без скутера не проживешь нормально.

reviews.title: The experience here is truly amazing.
reviews.text: We had a wonderful vacation, the room was airy, clean, conveniently located, and the staff was friendly!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Запах канализации

reviews.title: Beautiful room
reviews.text: The room is comfortable, very new, and the staff is enthusiastic. It is also close and convenient to Sunset Town and the amusement park. The beach nearby is not too far away either.

reviews.title: однозначно не рекомендую!
reviews.positives: отличное месторасположение
reviews.negatives: ужасный персонал! администраторы не могут решить никакие проблемы, полностью игнорируют. в номере было много сломанных предметов и ужасно грязно, вплоть до мертвых тараканов. в ванной на потолке плесень.

reviews.title: This is my second time using it.
reviews.text: I had a planned stay in Phu Quoc for 6 nights, spending 3 nights at this hotel in the southern area, and then moving to the city center near the airport for the remaining 3 nights. However, the atmosphere was completely different from the city center, and despite having already paid for the other place, I returned here for one night and spent the last 2 days here. It was costly, but I felt it was worth it to come back as I had a fulfilling time during the remaining 2 days. The room was clean and the hot water was comfortable. Credit cards can also be used. Most importantly, it's about a 20-minute walk to Sunset Town, so I was able to enjoy the town and fireworks every night. I would love to return to this hotel and highly recommend it.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Нормальное соотношение цены и места
reviews.negatives: Лифт ночью перестал работать в день отъезда и пришлось с 4 этажа спускать чемоданы( далеко от всего, тонкие стены и слышимость оч сильная, не убирались в номерах, окно сломано не закрывалось

reviews.title: This is a hotel I would recommend.
reviews.text: The room was very clean, and the view from the balcony was fantastic. The hot water was also ample. I could watch YouTube and Netflix, and I was able to walk to Sunset Town with its Kissvielet, where I enjoyed fireworks every night. There is also a washing machine and kitchen available for use. There's a supermarket about a 15-minute walk away. I felt happy to spend time in such a beautiful neighborhood and be in a lovely space. I definitely want to come back again. Lastly, the cup noodles provided on the desk and the juice in the fridge are for a fee.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Все соответствует описанию. Чистенько.
reviews.negatives: Шум в коридоре ночью. Сантехника требует ремонта. Тесновато.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Хорошее месторасположение, хотя и далековато от основных развлечений сансет Тауна (20 минут пешком через ночной рынок, на авто - 6 минут). При это удобно ездить на пляж Кхем. 

Очень тихая улочка. Минимум людей) Нормальный напор воды и как факт, наличие горячей воды всегда)
reviews.negatives:
Очень маленький балкон, на котором вдвоем уже тесно и можно только стоять, но это особенность местной архитектуры. 

Уборку в номере делали только если вешаешь табличку. Иначе даже мусор не выносили. Постельное белье заменили только после обращения на ресепшен (хотя мы останавливались на 10 дней). Минибар также не пополняли. 

Предыдущие постояльцы «оставили» в номере чемодан, который пропах дурианом. После обращения на ресепшен чемодан убрали. 

Отсутствующая звукоизоляция входной двери - было слышно все, что происходит в коридоре. 

Лифт, который невозможно дождаться (жили на верхнем этаже), но есть лестница.

Кондиционер работал очень слабо.

reviews.title: Satisfying experience in Nam Do Island.
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, the staff is friendly and welcoming. The prices are reasonable. The rooms are conveniently located for traveling to Honeymoon Bridge, the market, Khem Beach, Sao Beach... I feel very satisfied.

reviews.title: Оправдывает свою цену.
reviews.positives:
- Очень удачное расположение: тихий и красивый район.
- В пешей доступности несколько кафе и ресторанов.
- До пляжа можно дойти пешком примерно за 25 минут или доехать на такси за 30k.
- Рядом находится супермаркет Dugong и рынок с фруктами и овощами.
reviews.negatives:
- Уборка номера была минимальной: в углах оставалась пыль и грязь.(В целом, это не мешало отдыху)
- Матрас с просевшими пружинами, они скрипели и спать было не очень комфортно.
- Холодильник отключался вместе с электричеством при выходе из номера, но со временем эту проблему удалось устранить.

reviews.title: Hotel room standards
reviews.text: Beautiful room with good decoration. The service and prices are reasonable.

reviews.title: Рекомендую!
reviews.positives:
Расположение. До sunset 15мин пешком. Есть парковка для байков. На районе есть вкусные рестораны и кофейни. До Кхем 5мин на такси. 
Нет насекомых
reviews.negatives:
Комната все-таки маловата, но всего хватает.
Вечером, после заката , вода была холодной. И к напору вопросы.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is very clean, but I booked a 19m2 room with a balcony on the app, and when I received the room, it was quite small and did not have a balcony. On the plus side, the room is fairly airy and has 2 windows, and the furnishings are complete, so it's quite okay.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Очень красивые и чистые номера, насколько это возможно. Стафф не говорит по английски, общались через переводчик. Реагировали на все проблемы сразу. Уютные номера, новые не уставшие.
reviews.negatives: Заявленная кухня не была доступна и открыта всегда

reviews.title: 5 stars
reviews.text: The clean room is spacious, well-equipped, conveniently located, and the owner and staff are lovely.

reviews.negatives: Хороший вариант, если готовы на такси передвигаться. До пляжа 2 км

reviews.title: Good!!
reviews.text: Nice hotel, staff are very enthusiastic and friendly. The room is very clean; however, the hot water is a bit problematic, making it difficult to adjust to the appropriate temperature. The TV has both Netflix and YouTube, so you can watch movies comfortably. The hotel has a washing machine, but unfortunately, it was broken. However, it was just a small problem, and the receptionist can recommend a laundry service for you. We will come back in the future.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Хороший аккуратный отель, вполне комфортный и чистый. Убираться заходили каждый день. В целом все понравилось.
reviews.negatives: У нас в номере была зона кухни с раковиной и вытяжкой, большим холодильником и чайником - но не было плиты и никаких других кухонных принадлежностей. Было бы здорово если бы были хотя бы доска, нож и пара тарелок, вилок, чтобы этой зоной кухни можно было пользоваться, хотя бы фрукты порезать, а так она оказалось максимально бесполезной))

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: a comfy hotel around sunset town✨

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Отличное местоположение. Немного в стороне от шумного туристического центра, но в пешей доступности . Здесь же и множество кафешек... До пляжа Кхем, помимо байка,  можно и пешком (20 мин), можно и на бесплатном автобусе.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is clean, designed quite beautifully, spacious for 2 people, all necessary things are fully provided, convenient transportation in An Thới. There is a washing machine and dryer available for personal use.

reviews.title: спокойно, комфортно , красиво
reviews.positives: Это был хороший чистый отель, в тихом районе. До ближайшего пляжа Кхем на мопеде 10 минут езды, до sunset town так же 10 минут на мопеде. Ночью было очень тихо, потому что район многолюдный, половина отелей и домов рядом пустые, для меня это было большим плюсом. Интернет хороший, рядом есть много кафе и магазинов где можно перекусить, я была довольна расположением☘️

reviews.title: Bien mais loin de tout
reviews.text: Bon hôtel avec un bon rapport qualité prix. Personnel ok mais parle peu anglais. Propreté correcte. Il semble avoir un soucis avec l’eau chaude et avec des cafards mais lorsque nous avons vu par où ils rentraient et l’avoir condamné, nous étions tranquilles.

reviews.title: Отличное место для семейного отдыха!
reviews.positives: Детям очень понравился просторный номер, а нам — чистота и порядок во всём. Персонал сделал всё возможное, чтобы у нас было всё, что нужно.

reviews.title: All good :)
reviews.text: All in all a very good stay. You need to walk a bit to reach the food street and Restaurants but we dont mind Walking 15min. Clean and calm, would book again.

reviews.title: Нам очень понравилось пребывание здесь
reviews.positives: Отель современный, светлый и тихий. Персонал был дружелюбным и действительно заставил нас почувствовать себя желанными гостями. Ночной рынок находился всего в нескольких минутах ходьбы.

reviews.title: Neues Hotel
reviews.text: Das Hotel ist neu und die Einrichtung ist super. Man hat fast alles, was nötig ist. Die Lage ist sehr gut.

reviews.title: Замечательный семейный отель!
reviews.positives: Команда уборки поддерживала идеальную чистоту, а сотрудники на стойке регистрации всегда были готовы помочь. До ночного рынка и множества местных ресторанов можно дойти всего за несколько минут. Отличное соотношение цены и качества.

reviews.title: Scooter und Küche
reviews.text: Wir haben die Küche sehr oft genutzt und waren froh, dass wir den Scooter auch gleich beim Hotel mieten konnten. Das Personal ist immer da und hilfsbereit. Und auch aufmerksam. An einem Nachmittag haben wir den Schlüssel stecken lassen. Das Personal hat das gemerkt und uns den Schlüssel sicherheitshalber an die Reception gebracht. Die Nachtwache war auch in den frühen Morgenstunden sofort da und hat den Scooter von dem zusätzlichen Schloss für die Nacht gelöst.

reviews.title: Наше семейное пребывание было очень комфортным.
reviews.positives: Отель оказался безупречно чистым, а в номере было достаточно места для детей. Поблизости было много отличных вариантов для завтрака, а персонал даже помог организовать транспорт до канатной дороги. Обязательно вернёмся сюда снова!

reviews.title: Nhân viên thái độ
reviews.text:
Tôi đến khách sạn lúc 13h không có 1 người nào. Gọi số hotline lễ tân nói bên em 14h mới nhận phòng, tôi ok nhưng tại sao ks không có 1 người nào trực.
Khi lễ tân về ks thì thái độ với khách hàng, không lễ phép. 
Khách sạn cần xem lại cách làm việc của nhân viên.
Nếu có ra ngoài thì nói khách chờ em 1 chút cũng là lời nói.

reviews.title: Если нужно экономить - ок, но лучше выбирайте лучший комфорт.
reviews.negatives:
Обратите внимание, что отель накрутил себе рейтинг. Очень много коротких отзывов с оценкой 10. Я всегда ориентировалась на рейтинг, но теперь поняла, что нужно реально пересматривать отзывы.
Отель уже не новый, в туалете и ванной плесень, летают комары. В целом уборка не качественная - в углах паутина и грязь. Если вы специально не придете и не попросите убрать ваш номер/вынести мусор/поменять полотенца, никто этого делать не будет. Оказалось, что это еще нужно делать до 16:00.
Самое удачное, что нас обкусали то ли комары, то ли постельные клещи. Пришлось спать с закрытым окном и в штанах. 
Дешево конечно, но мы в итоге выселились раньше - очень хотелось спокойно поспать в свежей кровати без живностей.
Плюс в отзывах писали про отключение электричества, видимо, это частая история. Во время 5 дней, что мы там были, почти весь день не было электричества.
Рядом нет нормальных мест покушать, придется ездить на такси или брать мопед. Вокруг еще очень пусто.

reviews.title: mọi thứ đều ổn, trừ phần tắm

reviews.title: Tốt
reviews.text: Ks tốt

reviews.title: Overall, it was great. The rest of the stay
reviews.positives: Everything was great: location, facilities, reasonable price.
reviews.negatives:
The housekeeping ignored changing bed linen and cleaning properly during the first week of my stay even though I informed them several times, which caused frustration and total mess. One of them was brave enough to lie in my eyes and persuade that she had changed the sheets, but I am a hard nut to crack. Once you fail to provide proper service the management will be immediately informed. Luckily, lots of people look for jobs. The new hotel is ‘losing face’ because of such unprofessional  cleaners and one pregnant receptionist who was unable to solve issues diplomatically and demonstrate appropriate manners. Probably it’s time for her to leave the job. Hope the CEO will pay proper attention to that as the employees  may easily ruin the business.

Later on (starting from the 6th day of my long stay) the girls from the reception finally fixed that. But I was not the only guest who was mad about that unacceptable cleaning 🧽

reviews.positives: Great.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Goodd💪💪

reviews.title: Home away from home, a very relaxing place to stay.
reviews.positives:
The Hotel is in a quiet area and it is very peaceful, The beds weren't the rock hard, typical Viet style beds, innerspung mattresses, firm but very comfortable. The Hotel is exceptionally clean and very new, so IMHO, very good value. One very positive point I must make is that it is the first hotel in Vietnam, after 20 years of travelling here, and staying in many various places, that do not have super slippery tiles in the shower areas. As in the hotel photos, the floors are a woodgrain pattern floor and extremely safe, and give the bathroom a warm and an almost scandinavian appeal.
Restaurants, coffee shops, an ice cream parlour and even a beer garden, are all within 200 metres of the hotel.
The welcoming staff at reception also need a mention. Nothing was too much trouble for them and all booking requests were handled in a friendly and professional manner. Scooters can be hired at reception for 200,000 vnd per day if required.
I would definitely stay here again when next on Phu Quoc Island.
reviews.negatives: All good in my book.

reviews.text: Приехали на 2 дня из вьетнамской деревни посетить сан сет Таун, шоу и хем бич. Номер большой кровать удобная  вода есть в номере , но не убирались не меняли полотенца даже не заходили  до города 30 мин пешком сто ко же до пляжа. reviews.title: Отель соответствует своей цене
reviews.text:
Расположение позволяет дойти пешком (1,5-2 км) до таких достопримечательностей, как Тюрьма , канатная дорога. 
Это первый из 23х отелей, в которых мы останавливались во Вьетнаме, который принципиально не заселяет гостей раньше 14 ч. Мы приехали в 12, нам сказали, что номер еще не готов и будет готов не раньше 14 ч, так как заезд в 14. Мы сели работать (удаленщики) в холле, весь персонал дружно в холле не спеша пообедал и в 14 к нам так никто и не подошел, чтобы заселить. В 14:05 я опять подошла к ресепшену, показала на часы и только тогда мне дали ключ от номера.
Заселившись, обнаружила, что вода в раковине не проходит (засор), спустилась и попросила исправить это недоразумение. Сказали Ждите. В 19 часов опять напомнила - опять ждите. Так все 4 дня мы и прождали сантехника, чистя зубы над унитазом, так как в раковине была забита. 
При выезде с нас взяли 30000 донгов за Доширак, который стоял вместе с привычными пакетиками кофе и стаканами, как во многих отелях Вьетнама. О том, что он платный не было ни одного знака и надписи, во всех предыдущих отелях, где тоже к кофе стоял доширак, он был включен в стоимость номера, то есть без доплат. Этот отель же уникальный по всем трем критериям:
1) Внимание к гостям (заселение строго после 14 и только если сам напомнишь, даже если 5 часов сидишь в холле)
2) Сервис (сантехник за 4 дня так и не дошел до нас)
3) Гостеприимство (поставить копеечный доширак вместе с бесплатным кофе, чтобы взять за него деньги при выезде.
В целом, если все выше  не критично, то расположение удобное.

reviews.title: This hotel truly impressed us
reviews.positives: The cleanliness was remarkable, and the staff went out of their way to ensure our stay was comfortable. A great spot for couples who enjoy calm surroundings.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Останавливались на одну ночь перед НГ,так как в центре Сансет тауна все было раскуплено или дорого.Отель недорогой,чистый,все что полагалось было,тут все Ок. А вот сам район на любителя, так как это окраины Сансет тауна или как я его назвал вьетнамский квартал, так как тут живут в основном вьетнамцы.До всей движухи минут 20 скорым шагом.Из плюсов тихо и даже безлюдно,рядом парк.но очень много зданий,в которых никто не живет. К плюсам еще можно отнести вьетнамские дешевые кафе рядом.Но все же ,если хотите проникнутся атмосферой праздника, то все же рекомендую остановиться в самом центре Сансет тауна,там совсем другая атмосфера.

reviews.title: Ideal hotel for families
reviews.positives: We stayed as a family of four and were very satisfied. The hotel was quiet, the room was large, and the housekeeping service was excellent. Great access to the beach and night market.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Все ок живу нормально

reviews.title: Fantastic family experience
reviews.positives: The staff were extremely kind and helpful, and the cleaning service was top-notch. The hotel’s location made it easy to visit nearby attractions and restaurants.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Всё понравилось, чисто, удобно и хорошо. Далековато от достопримечательностей и пляжа, но брали такси недорого. Зато тихо, спокойно.за свою цену вообще отлично

reviews.title: Lovely hotel with excellent service
reviews.positives: The staff were attentive without being intrusive, and the room was spotless. Great value and location for couples exploring the area.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Not bad hotel for that price, clean rooms

reviews.title: Our family had such a relaxing time
reviews.positives: The hotel is close to everything – the cable car, Sunset Town, and the night market. The room smelled wonderful and was cleaned daily with care.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: 房間整潔，離夜市走路約15-20分鐘，附近建築還在開發中，所以比較沒有喧嘩聲

reviews.title: Perfect for couples looking for a peaceful escape
reviews.positives: The room was spacious, bright, and had a window with a lovely view. We enjoyed walking to Sunset Town every evening.

reviews.title: Perfect location near Sunset Town and the beach.
reviews.positives: The room was cozy, clean, and well-maintained. The staff went above and beyond to make our anniversary trip memorable. We highly recommend this hotel for couples seeking comfort and convenience.

reviews.title: We spent two days here as a family and were truly impressed.
reviews.positives: The hotel is clean, peaceful, and ideally located near Hon Thom Cable Car. Housekeeping did an amazing job; our room was fresh every day. The staff were warm and patient with our children. We couldn’t have asked for a better experience.
